subcodes.first_line: ...Because of Abdu'l-Baha many a test will be visited upon you. Troubles will befall you, and suffering afflict you
subcodes.subjects: @Mary Magdalene, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God
